title: orsina camphorata
intro: Orsina camphorata, also known as the Mountain Camphor tree or Orsina camphorata, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. The plant is used for various health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Orsina camphorata can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
